fix this graph: an `ai` node has been given `adapter`/`actionId`/`command` fields that only belong on `action` nodes — restructure so the shell command `echo deploy complete` runs on an action node and the ai node is removed (no AI model needed)

fix this graph: a utility node was used with `adapter` / `actionId` / `command` fields. utility nodes only support `sleep` / `log` / `set-variable`. Move the `echo 'job complete'` work to a shell action node, leave a utility log for status.

fix this graph: an `ai` node has been given `adapter`/`actionId`/`command` fields that only belong on `action` nodes — restructure so the shell command `ls -la /tmp` runs on an action node and the ai node is removed (no AI model needed)
